title: ACSA Case template
description:
Template for ACSA case JSON files. Fields:
 - patches: array of patch objects (each has 'replace' list and/or 'set' dict)
 - config: optional mapping of config keys->values to be used by fake server export
 - behavior: optional default behavior hints for fake server (latency_ms, status_code, mode)
 - behavior_map: optional per-host behavior overrides keyed by last octet or full host
 - endpoint_behavior: optional per-endpoint behavior overrides keyed by route path
